keywords: CLIENT_TO_FREELANCER FREELANCER_TO_CLIENT single direction duplicate check append-only audit comment excluded PII FreelancerReviewSubmitted DuplicateReviewRejected VALID_REVIEW_DIRECTIONS no updateDocument
teachingPoint: T616 FreelancerReviewWriter enforces one review per direction per engagement. ORDER 1: direction must be in VALID_REVIEW_DIRECTIONS. ORDER 2: duplicate check — searchDocuments for same engagementId + direction combination. ORDER 3: storeDocument review record WITH comment (private). ORDER 4: storeDocument audit record WITHOUT comment (PII protection per CF-17-4). FreelancerReviewSubmitted event payload never includes comment field. updateDocument on review records is prohibited — append-only.
ironRules: VALID_REVIEW_DIRECTIONS = ['CLIENT_TO_FREELANCER','FREELANCER_TO_CLIENT'] as const — direction must be one of these two values
Duplicate direction check: searchDocuments for existing review with same engagementId + direction — any match returns DuplicateReviewRejected
Review record stored with comment field (private scope) — updateDocument is prohibited on review records
Audit record stored WITHOUT comment field — comment is PII, excluded from PLATFORM_ONLY audit scope per CF-17-4
FreelancerReviewSubmitted event payload MUST NOT include comment field — comment never leaves private storage
